In any case feel free to say if its good or nah in the comments so I can improve and if y'all want, make more of these bots ^-^ (btw, I didn't try this, so idk how the bot talks!!!!)

Now the "rant"

I just think is kind of pointless andsilly to make this new rule abt NSFW images when the majority of the site is infested w it, my bots included. Plus, there's already (or there was, idk if they got rid of it) an option that makes u blur NSFW images if u want. I'm not against ppl not wanting NSFW images, but this new upd8 makes MY work in finding images even harder, and more for already existing characters 💔

Idk if this bot is gonna be flagged bc I don't cknsider it very sexual, they're just in bikini. In case it gets flagged I'll just crop the image to their faces even if it looks bad ;P meh, not a fan of this update but what can I do
